title: Nursery Rhyme. CXCIX. Riddles.
content:
Every lady in this land
        Has twenty nails upon each hand,
        Five and twenty hands and feet,
        All this is true without deceit.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CXCIX. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
